cd /Users/kai/Documents/Projects/Hyo && git add website/hq.html website/research.html agents/sam/website/hq.html agents/sam/website/research.html && git commit -m 'feat: mobile responsive layout for HQ and research pages

HQ: hamburger menu toggles sidebar as drawer overlay on mobile (<768px).
Sidebar slides in from left, overlay backdrop, auto-closes on nav click.
Desktop layout unchanged.

Research: collapsible item list with toggle button on mobile.
Auto-collapses when item selected for full-width reading.
Replaces cramped 45vh/55vh split with toggle-based UX.
